g.text: No API keys. No setup. Watch what happens when model reasoning
silently degrades , and how cngx catches it.
Pipeline completed with output, but reasoning assumptions were violated: Downstream
assumes verification, but none performed, Downstream
The model still gave a plausible answer , but skipped the reasoning
steps your policy requires. Without cngx that ships silently.
and get alerted only on corroborated drift , not shorter answers alone.
